response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: Perfect phonetic and lexical match between the video's vocal track and the reference lyrics.
2. JSON Usage: Fully used for transcription and translation, adding custom subtitles for the spoken intro dialogue and the visual title card.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timed speech and lyrics precisely to vocal chords, using truncation where appropriate for the rapid rap sections to prevent cascading delays. No closed caption elements are included.

subtitles.original: 行ってきよ、早く！
subtitles.english: Go on, hurry!

subtitles.original: 行った？
subtitles.english: Did they go?

subtitles.original: 行ったね。なんだったんだろうね。
subtitles.english: They're gone. I wonder what that was.

subtitles.original: あ、なんか... なんか落ちてきたよ！
subtitles.english: Oh, something... something's falling!

subtitles.original: 花びらかな、これ。
subtitles.english: Is this a flower petal?

subtitles.original: こっちから降ってきた？
subtitles.english: Did it fall from over here?

subtitles.original: ちょっと行ってみよう！
subtitles.english: Let's go check it out!

subtitles.original: さくら (作詞・作曲：ケツメイシ)
subtitles.english: Sakura (Lyrics/Composition: Ketsumeishi)

subtitles.original: さくら舞い散る中に忘れた記憶と
subtitles.english: In the falling cherry blossoms, forgotten memories...

subtitles.original: 君の声が戻ってくる
subtitles.english: and your voice come back to me.

subtitles.original: 吹き止まない春の風
subtitles.english: The spring wind that won't stop blowing,

subtitles.original: あの頃のままで
subtitles.english: just as it was back then.

subtitles.original: 君が風に舞う髪かき分けた時の
subtitles.english: The pale scent of your hair when you brushed it in the wind...

subtitles.original: 淡い香り戻ってくる
subtitles.english: will come back to me.

subtitles.original: 二人約束した
subtitles.english: Just as we were back then,

subtitles.original: あの頃のままで
subtitles.english: when we made a promise.

subtitles.original: ヒュルリーラ ヒュルリーラ
subtitles.english: Hyururiira hyururiira...

subtitles.original: ヒュルリーラ ヒュルリーラ
subtitles.english: Hyururiira hyururiira...

subtitles.original: ヒュルリーラ ヒュルリーラ
subtitles.english: Hyururiira hyururiira...

subtitles.original: ヒュルリーラ...
subtitles.english: Hyururiira...

subtitles.original: さくら散りだす 思い出す 意味なく
subtitles.english: Cherry blossoms start to fall, reminding me for no reason

subtitles.original: 灯り出す あの頃 また気になる
subtitles.english: Those days begin to light up, weighing on my mind again

subtitles.original: 変わらない香り 景色 風
subtitles.english: The same scent, scenery, and wind

subtitles.original: 違うのは君がいないだけ
subtitles.english: The only difference is that you're not here

subtitles.original: ここに立つと甦る こみ上げる記憶 読み返す
subtitles.english: Standing here revives them, as I reread the welling memories

subtitles.original: 春風に舞う長い髪 たわいないことでまた騒いだり
subtitles.english: Your long hair dancing in the spring breeze, making a fuss over silly things again

subtitles.original: さくら木の真下 語り明かした
subtitles.english: Right beneath the cherry blossom tree, we talked all night

subtitles.original: 思い出は俺 輝いた証だ
subtitles.english: Those memories are proof of the shine I once had

subtitles.original: さくら散る頃 出会い 別れ
subtitles.english: We met and parted around the time the cherry blossoms fall

subtitles.original: それでもここ まだ変わらぬままで
subtitles.english: Even so, this place remains unchanged

subtitles.original: 咲かした芽 君 離した手
subtitles.english: The buds that bloomed, and the hand I let go of yours

subtitles.original: いつしか別れ 交わしたね
subtitles.english: Before we knew it, we parted ways, didn't we?

subtitles.original: さくら舞う季節に 取り戻す
subtitles.english: In the season of dancing cherry blossoms, I will take it back

subtitles.original: あの頃 そして君 呼び起こす
subtitles.english: Those days, and evoke your presence once more

subtitles.original: 花びら舞い散る
subtitles.english: Petals dance and scatter...

subtitles.original: 記憶舞い戻る
subtitles.english: memories come rushing back.

subtitles.original: 花びら舞い散る
subtitles.english: Petals dance and scatter...

subtitles.original: 記憶舞い戻る
subtitles.english: memories come rushing back.

subtitles.original: 気付けばまた この季節で
subtitles.english: Before I know it, it's this season again

subtitles.original: 君との思い出に誘われ
subtitles.english: Lured by memories of you

subtitles.original: 心の扉たたいた
subtitles.english: I knocked on the door of my heart

subtitles.original: 手ですり抜けた花びら
subtitles.english: But the petals slipped through my fingers

subtitles.original: 初めて分かった 俺若かった
subtitles.english: For the first time I understood, I was so young

subtitles.original: この場所来るまで分からなかったが
subtitles.english: I didn't get it until I came to this place

subtitles.original: 此処だけは今も何故 運命のように香る風
subtitles.english: But why is it that only here, the wind still scents of destiny?

subtitles.original: 暖かい陽の光がこぼれる
subtitles.english: Warm sunlight spills down

subtitles.original: 目を閉じればあの日戻れる
subtitles.english: If I close my eyes, I can return to that day

subtitles.original: いつしか君の面影は
subtitles.english: Before I know it, your silhouette...

subtitles.original: 消えてしまうよ 何処かへ
subtitles.english: will disappear off to somewhere.

subtitles.original: あの日以来景色変わらない
subtitles.english: The scenery hasn't changed since that day

subtitles.original: 散りゆく花びらは語らない
subtitles.english: The scattering petals do not speak

subtitles.original: さくらの下に響いた君の声 今はもう
subtitles.english: Your voice that echoed under the cherry blossoms is now no more...
